2026-05-26TCCanada Marine ActReappointment of a director of the St. John's Port AuthorityReappointment of Stacey Patricia Howse of Portugal Cove-St. Philip’s, Newfoundland and Labrador, as a director of the St. John's Port Authority, to hold office for a term of three years.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a director of the St. John's Port Authority
precis: Reappointment of Stacey Patricia Howse of Portugal Cove-St. Philip’s, Newfoundland and Labrador, as a director of the St. John's Port Authority, to hold office for a term of three years.
